queryName: Cloudwatch Cloudtrail Configuration Changes Alarm Missing
expectedValue: aws_cloudwatch_log_metric_filter should have pattern { ($.eventName = CreateTrail) || ($.eventName = UpdateTrail) || ($.eventName = DeleteTrail) || ($.eventName = StartLogging) || ($.eventName = StopLogging) } and be associated an aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm
